case_title: EUGENE LEDBETTER VS. VELJON COMBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-16-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EUGENE LEDBETTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS VELJON COMBS & BERNARD HUTCHERSON ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE A CLAIM WITH THE CALIFORNIA VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD (CALVCB) AND CONTACT THE SF DISTRICT ATTORNEY VICTIM SERVICES DIVISION / UNIT, WHICH ASSISTS VICTIMS WITH THE PROCESSING OF THEIR VICTIM COMPENSATION CLAIMS AND ANY LOSSES THAT ARE CRIME RELATED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES.
ORDER TO CONTINUE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-01-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMBS, VELJON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-11-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EUGENE LEBBETTER IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VELJON COMBS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BERNARD HUTCHERSON. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEDBETTER, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT COMBS, VELJON HUTCHERSON, BENARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED OCT-15-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUTCHERSON, BENARD
